dva.title: Virtual Bank Account
dva.subtitle: Get account number wey you go dey receive money

bvn_form.title: Confirm say na you
bvn_form.subtitle: Make you fit collect money, we need confirm your identity
bvn_form.wait_message: Paystack dey verify your BVN. E fit take 1-2 minutes.
bvn_form.polling_message: We dey check every 10 seconds. You fit comot — the account go show when e don ready.
